title: Maisie Marlowe's Angel's Ascent
description: A mod that adds a plethora of new end-game items and features. Works on servers and clients.
body:
**How to start the grind**
- Use a shovel, axe, pickaxe, or hoe on a filled End Portal Frame to receive Ender Shards.
- Netherite Pickaxe required to mine Soul Ore in The End

**What can be expected from crafting?**

- 9 Ender Pearls are needed to craft 1 Compressed Ender Pearl
- 9 Compressed Ender Pearls are needed to craft 1 Double Compressed Ender Pearl
- 9 Double Compressed Ender Pearls are needed to craft 1 Triple Compressed Ender Pearl
- 9 Triple Compressed Ender Pearls are needed to craft 1 Ultra Compressed Ender Pearl

That was a lot just for one item... 

Smelting/Blasting Ender Shards creates Purified Ender Shards, which can be crafted around an Ultra Purified Ender Eye and Soul Powder (place 1 Soul Fragement in a crafting UI) to create a Purified Eye of Ender.

**Drills**

As a replacement for a pickaxe, you can craft a Soul Drill out of Soul Powder, Soul Fragments, and a diamond.

The highest tier of materials (no spoilers :wink:) can also be used to craft a drill, but a pickaxe is also offered.

**Wings**

Because of programming knowledge limitations, wearing wings negates all fall damage as of this first version. Wings grant the player infinite flight, similar to flying in Creative Mode. Flight Speed can be toggled using a configurable keybind in the Minecraft Keybinds menu ('G' by default).

**This mod is not free from bugs and features were temporarily cut due to time restraints. Some features had to be sacrified due to my limited knowledge and the aforementioned time constraints.**

**Bugs are encouraged to be reported on the mod's GitHub repository: https://github.com/Maisie-Marlowe/Angels-Ascent-1.20.2**

**REQUIRES:**

Owo-lib 0.11.4

GeckoLib 4.3.1

Fabric API
